design_direction: Premium automotive (deep navy/graphite, refined, luxury feel)

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Use col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.card_padding: p-8 or p-10 to prevent text collision

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#060A14]/60 border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.cards: Refracted Glass UI / Neumorphism - bg-[#0D1322] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)]
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-slate-200. Secondary: border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5
surface_strategies.forms: Shadcn components customized with dark backgrounds, white/10 borders, and focus:ring-white/30.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift (-translate-y-1) with intensified border glow (border-white/30).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in using framer-motion. Smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.marquees: Slow organic drift for Trust Badges.

components.hero: Dark cinematic feel. Background uses abstract AI lines with a heavy bg-black/60 overlay. Headline: AutoAce. CTA: Request Demo.
components.features_bento: Asymmetrical layout highlighting: Inbound/Outbound calls, 24/7 Availability, DMS Integration.
components.roi_section: Control room grid layout comparing AI missed leads capture vs human-led negotiations.
components.trust_section: Co-founder Bradley Bunch (MIT Engineer) section with portrait. Mentions Y Combinator.
components.lead_capture_form: Floating glass card with inputs: Name, Dealership Name, Email, Phone.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark AI lines for the hero section background. Apply a bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

dealership_showroom.description: Dark luxury car showroom, used in Features or Hybrid Model section.

texture_background.description: Dark graphite texture, used as a background pattern for the Form section.

founder_portrait.description: Professional portrait for Bradley Bunch (MIT Engineer) in the About section.

y_combinator.instruction: Use text-based badge or standard SVG to maintain premium look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme + Archetype 5 (Luxury) palette. No pure blacks, use deep navy/graphite (#060A14 and #0D1322).
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Add to index.html from an external source if needed.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes.
Build the bento grids using raw HTML/Tailwind for asymmetry. Use Shadcn ONLY for form interactions.
Implement Lucide React icons with thin stroke widths (1.5).
Overlay all background images with dark gradients (e.g., bg-black/60) to ensure high text contrast.
Use framer-motion sparingly for elegant staggered reveals.
